title: SRE App Contract
description: Validates an SRE Platform App Contract YAML file. An App Contract declares everything the platform needs to deploy, secure, and observe an application.

apiVersion.description: API version of the App Contract schema. Must be exactly 'sre.io/v1alpha1'.

metadata.description: Metadata identifying the application and owning team.

name.description: Application name in kebab-case. Must start with a lowercase letter followed by lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens.

team.description: Owning team name. Must start with 'team-' followed by a lowercase kebab-case identifier.

spec.description: Application specification defining type, image, resources, networking, and integrations.

type.description: Application workload type. Determines which Helm chart template is used: 'web-app' for HTTP services, 'api-service' for internal APIs, 'worker' for background processors, 'cronjob' for scheduled jobs.

image.description: Container image reference. Must start with 'harbor.' (internal registry) and include a pinned tag. The ':latest' tag is forbidden.

port.description: TCP port the application listens on. Must be between 1 and 65535. Defaults to 8080.

replicas.description: Number of pod replicas. Must be between 1 and 20. Defaults to 2.

resources.description: Resource profile for the application. Predefined sizes: 'small' (100m/128Mi), 'medium' (500m/512Mi), 'large' (1000m/1Gi). Use 'custom' to specify exact values via customResources.

customResources.description: Custom resource requests and limits. Required when spec.resources is 'custom', ignored otherwise.

requests.description: Minimum resources guaranteed to the container.

cpu.description: CPU request in Kubernetes quantity format (e.g. '100m', '0.5', '1').

memory.description: Memory request in Kubernetes quantity format (e.g. '128Mi', '1Gi').

limits.description: Maximum resources the container may consume.

cpu.description: CPU limit in Kubernetes quantity format (e.g. '500m', '1', '2').

memory.description: Memory limit in Kubernetes quantity format (e.g. '512Mi', '2Gi').

ingress.description: Public hostname for external access via the Istio ingress gateway (e.g. 'my-service.apps.sre.example.com'). Omit for internal-only services.

probes.description: Health check probe paths for Kubernetes liveness and readiness probes.

liveness.description: HTTP path for the liveness probe (e.g. '/healthz'). Kubernetes restarts the pod if this fails.

readiness.description: HTTP path for the readiness probe (e.g. '/readyz'). Kubernetes removes the pod from service if this fails.

env.description: Environment variables for the application. Each entry provides either a plain value or a reference to a secret in OpenBao (synced via External Secrets Operator).

value.description: Plain-text value for the environment variable. Mutually exclusive with 'secret'.

secret.description: Name of the OpenBao secret to inject. The platform creates an ExternalSecret to sync this value. Mutually exclusive with 'value'.

services.description: Platform-managed backing services to provision alongside the application.

database.description: PostgreSQL database instance managed by the platform.

enabled.description: Whether to provision a PostgreSQL database for this application.

size.description: Database instance size. 'small' for dev/test, 'medium' for production, 'large' for high-throughput.

redis.description: Redis cache instance managed by the platform.

enabled.description: Whether to provision a Redis cache for this application.

size.description: Redis instance size. 'small' for dev/test, 'medium' for production, 'large' for high-throughput.

sso.description: Keycloak SSO integration for the application.

enabled.description: Whether to configure a Keycloak OIDC client and Istio RequestAuthentication for this application.

externalApis.description: External API hostnames that the application needs to reach. The platform creates NetworkPolicy egress rules and Istio ServiceEntry resources for each.

items.description: Fully qualified domain name of an external API (e.g. 'api.stripe.com').

schedule.description: Cron expression for scheduled execution. Required when spec.type is 'cronjob', forbidden for all other types (e.g. '0 */6 * * *').

canary.description: Canary deployment configuration using Istio traffic splitting.

enabled.description: Whether to enable canary deployments with progressive traffic shifting.
